title: HeroTopia
body:
## HeroTopia
HeroTopia is a Project made of the YouTuber project Minecraft Helden which offers you an exciting adventure with PvP! 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/muEFrNhuxMc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#
You can interact with other players via voice chat and explore the 7,000 x 7,000 block map. 
![A minecraft player holding a map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4745e4384fee2bd1c053957d5e95d8a7a2f7e841.png)
#
But be careful, because your heart is at stake! 
- You have 3 hearts, but you lose one heart for every death caused by another player. 
- If you run out of hearts, you are eliminated. 
![A Steve head with three hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d309f65c2fe9b94f3e424aeeed4b6599c1d1da.png)
#
Give your horse armour or call it to you, get new decoration blocks, new items and much more with this small matching modpack. 
![A Boy riding a horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce744de43ab6c3c56b87ce61958c0864ee5e5ab4.png)
#
Each player starts on one of the two starting islands until the entire map is unlocked after a week. Get to know the complete game principle and play along!
![A minecraft player with a bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/389cc8585817fd142d16b0bb528410dce00eb34d.png)
##
**Note:** This modpack is only intended for the Modtopia project.
